title: Night Hunters
description: The Night Hunter mod, is a mod that adds two new groups of interest into Minecraft, the Vampires, and the Vampire Hunters.
body:
Welcome to the Night Hunters mod, this mod adds in two new groups into your Minecraft world, the Vampires and the Vampire Hunters. If you ever felt that Minecraft needed some extra challenges, then this is the mod for you, the Vampires are hidden inside of Manors that are hidden inside of forests, and although these manors are rare they are not for the unprepared, it's recommended to go in with enchanted Netherite armor to avoid being immediately defeated. The Vampire Hunters are a whole different matter entirely, they are neutral to the player, and will onlyattack if they are provoked, if they are provoked there numbers will make them very formidable, as they have archers, swordsman and there captains, but with diamond armor they will go down, and skilled players will only need iron.

Added Features.

Vampires

  Vampire Servants: The Vampire Servants are beings bitten by the Vampire Masters but not trasformed, they are weak, and will go down quickly to even the most unequiped players, however they only spawn in the Vampire Manors.

  Vampire Masters: The Vampire Masters are extremely powerful, with 60 Health, and dishing 15 damage to unarmored players, the Vampire Masters are deadly in close quarters combat, they also effect any players nearby with weakness, the only way to bring down a Vampire Master is with a trap, ranged weapon, or late game armor and weapons. Upon Death the Vampire Master will drop a Blood Gem, two Blood Gems along with a stick can make the Blood Sword, which does 13 damage, and gives the player temporary regeneration.

  Vampire Manors: The Vampire Manor can only be found in forests, and forest variants, they are very rare, and will house several Vampire Masters and Vampire Servants making them a late game challenge.

Vampire Hunters

  Vampire Hunters: The Vampire Hunters come in three different varients, the Archer, which shoots arrows at there enemies while wearing leather armor, the swordsman who will engage in close quarters combat with an iron sword and chain mail armor, and the captain, the captain will fight with the swordsman but has a diamond sword, and full iron armor, both the swordsman and captain have shields. The Vampire Hunters will attack any hostile Undead overworld entities such as zombies, zombie villagers, and skeletons, as well as attacking the Vampires.

  Vampire Hunter Camps: The Vampire Hunter Camps can be located around your world, a small camp consisting of a fence barrier, and a tent, the camps will have a couple of archers and swordsman, as well as a captain, the camps can be found in snow biomes, deserts, and plains, and will have a different variant for sand, grass, and snow.

Final notes: The different structures can all be spawned in through items found in the creative menu.
